versions.version_description: I just think it sounds better and more closely reflects how the song really is played.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
intro: [ch]Bm[/ch]-[ch]A[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch]-[ch]Bm[/ch]-[ch]A[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch] 2x

verse:
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch] 
grew up in a small town[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
And when the rain would fall down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
i'd just stare out my window[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
dreaming of what could be[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Ang if i end up happy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
I would pray[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
Trying hard to reach out[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
But when i try to speak out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Felt like no one could hear me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Wanted to belong here[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
But something felt so wrong here[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
so i pray[/tab]

refrain: 
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
i could breakaway[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
i'll spread my wings[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
and i'll learn how to fly[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
i'll do what it takes[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
'till i touch the sky[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
make a wish, take a chance[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
make a change[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
and breakaway[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
out of the darkness [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
and into the sun[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] 
but i won't forget [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
all the ones that i love[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
i'll take a risk, take a chance[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Make a change[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
and break away[/tab]

verse2: same as verse1
chorus: same as first chorus

bridge:
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Buildings with a hundred doors[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
swinging 'round revolving doors[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
Maybe i don't know [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
where they'll take me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
but gotta keep movin' on, movin' on[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Fly away[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Break away[/tab]

chorus3: same with chorus 2

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
break Away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Break away[/tab]
